sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88879" key="prosdianohte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσδια-νοητέον</orth>, <sense id="n88879.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must consider besides</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg034.perseus-grc1:740b" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">740b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
